top_fixes.title: Fix your social media preview
top_fixes.description: When someone shares your website on Facebook or LinkedIn, it shows a blank preview instead of your business name and a nice photo. This makes you look unprofessional and reduces clicks. We need to add a preview image and ensure the sharing information is properly set up.

top_fixes.title: Make your site mobile-friendly
top_fixes.description: Your site prevents mobile users from zooming in or out, which can make text impossible to read for people with vision issues. Google also penalizes sites that aren't mobile-friendly. We need to fix the mobile settings so your site works properly on all phones.

top_fixes.title: Speed up your website
top_fixes.description: Your site loads slowly because it has too many scripts and messy code running in the background. Slow sites frustrate visitors and Google ranks them lower in search results. We need to clean up the code and optimize loading speed.

top_fixes.title: Fix your page title capitalization
top_fixes.description: Your page title starts with lowercase 'canberra' which looks unprofessional in Google search results. Professional businesses always capitalize properly. This small change makes a big difference in how trustworthy you appear to potential clients.

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to all your images
top_fixes.description: 10 of your images don't have descriptions, which means Google doesn't understand what they show and screen readers can't describe them to visually impaired visitors. This hurts both your search ranking and accessibility.

top_fixes.title: Improve your content structure
top_fixes.description: Your content doesn't have enough subheadings to help visitors quickly scan and find what they're looking for. Well-organized content with clear headings also helps Google understand your page better and can improve your search ranking.

top_fixes.title: Make testimonials more prominent
top_fixes.description: You have client reviews but they're not prominent enough on your homepage. Visible testimonials build trust with potential clients and can significantly increase your conversion rate from website visitors to actual customers.

top_fixes.title: Add a skip navigation link
top_fixes.description: People who navigate with keyboards (including those with disabilities) can't easily skip to your main content. Adding a skip link helps these users and also shows Google that you care about accessibility, which can positively impact your search ranking.

result.email_draft:
Hi there,

I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers.

The main issue is that when someone shares your site on Facebook or LinkedIn, it shows up blank instead of displaying your business name and a professional photo — this makes you miss out on potential referrals. Also, your site prevents mobile users from zooming, which can frustrate clients trying to view property details on their phones.

These are relatively quick fixes that could make a big difference in how many enquiries you get from your website. Your content and overall approach look great, it's just these technical details holding you back.

Would you be interested in a free 15-minute chat about how to fix these issues? I'd be happy to walk you through what's happening and how it impacts your business.

Cheers,
Jarek Piotrowski
LayerOps

top_fixes.title: Replace template placeholder text with your actual medical centre description
top_fixes.description: Right now your site description says 'Responsive Medical Health WordPress Theme' which looks unprofessional and won't help patients find you on Google. This template text makes your established medical centre (since 1995) look like an unfinished website, damaging patient trust. Replace it with a proper description of your medical services and location in Palmerston.

top_fixes.title: Add your phone number and contact details prominently
top_fixes.description: Patients can't find your phone number or any contact information on the homepage. For a medical centre, this is critical - people need to book appointments or call in emergencies. Add a prominent 'Call Now' button with your phone number, plus your address and email address so patients can easily get in touch.

top_fixes.title: Create proper navigation menu for patients
top_fixes.description: Your website has no navigation menu, making it impossible for patients to find information about your services, doctors, opening hours, or how to book appointments. Add a clear menu with sections like 'Services', 'Our Doctors', 'Opening Hours', and 'Contact Us' so patients can quickly find what they need.

top_fixes.title: Add business information for Google searches
top_fixes.description: Google doesn't understand that you're a medical centre because there's no business information in your website's code. This means you won't show up properly in local health searches or Google Maps. Adding this information helps patients find you when searching for 'doctors near me' or 'medical centre Palmerston'.

top_fixes.title: Fix social media sharing to show your medical centre properly
top_fixes.description: When someone shares your website on Facebook or LinkedIn, it shows 'Responsive Medical Health WordPress Theme' instead of your medical centre name and services. This looks unprofessional and won't encourage referrals. Fix this so social shares show your clinic name, services, and a professional image.

top_fixes.title: Organize content with proper headings for easy scanning
top_fixes.description: Your homepage has almost no organized content - just one heading and a few lists. Patients can't quickly scan to find information about services, doctors, or opening hours. Add clear headings like 'Our Services', 'Meet Our Doctors', and 'Opening Hours' to make information easy to find.

top_fixes.title: Speed up your website loading time
top_fixes.description: Your website is slow to load, which frustrates patients trying to find medical information quickly or book appointments on their phones. The site has too many separate files loading at once. Combining and optimizing these files will make your site load faster and keep patients engaged.

top_fixes.title: Improve accessibility for all patients
top_fixes.description: Your website is difficult for patients with disabilities to use - there's no way for screen reader users to jump to main content sections, and forms aren't properly labeled. Making your site more accessible not only helps all patients use your services but also improves your Google ranking.

result.email_draft:
G'day!

I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local patients.

Your homepage still shows 'Responsive Medical Health WordPress Theme' as the description instead of information about Palmerston Medical Centre - this makes it hard for patients to find you on Google and looks a bit unprofessional for an established practice since 1995. Also, there's no phone number visible on the homepage, which means patients can't easily call to book appointments.

These are straightforward fixes that could make a real difference in helping local patients find and contact your practice.

I'm Jarek from LayerOps, and I help Canberra businesses improve their websites. Would you like a free 15-minute chat about making your site work better for your patients?

Cheers,

paragraph_texts: Hello. We're Harrington Hall, a law firm based in Canberra. Whether you’re buying a home, starting a business or looking to resolve a disput

We offer a broad range of commercial services to meet the needs of businesses of all sizes.

top_fixes.title: Add a clear main heading to your homepage
top_fixes.description: Your page has no H1 heading, which is like having a book with no title. Google doesn't know what your page is about, and visitors are confused. Add a clear heading like 'Expert Property & Commercial Lawyers in Canberra' at the top of your page.

top_fixes.title: Fix your contact form so everyone can use it
top_fixes.description: Your contact form has no labels telling people what to type where. This means people using screen readers can't fill it out, and you're missing potential clients. Also hurts your Google ranking since accessibility matters.

top_fixes.title: Add more content about your legal services
top_fixes.description: Your homepage only has 2 short paragraphs. Google and potential clients need to understand exactly what legal help you provide. Add sections explaining your property, construction, and commercial law expertise.

top_fixes.title: Make your phone number and 'Contact Us' button obvious
top_fixes.description: People need legal help urgently but your contact details aren't prominent. Add a big, clear 'Call Now' button with your phone number at the top of every page so people can reach you immediately.

top_fixes.title: Add descriptions to all your images
top_fixes.description: 19 out of 21 images have no descriptions. Google can't 'see' images without descriptions, so you're missing out on image search traffic. Also makes your site unusable for people with vision impairments.

top_fixes.title: Fix your heading structure
top_fixes.description: Your headings jump around (no H1, no H2, then H3s) which confuses Google about your page structure. It's like having chapter 3 without chapters 1 and 2. Fix the order so Google can properly understand your content.

top_fixes.title: Simplify your website's code
top_fixes.description: Your site loads 39 different script files and has messy code scattered throughout. This slows down your site and makes it harder to update. Clean code means faster loading and better Google rankings.

top_fixes.title: Modernize your design to look more professional
top_fixes.description: Your website looks dated, which doesn't inspire confidence in potential clients seeking legal services. A modern, professional design helps establish trust and credibility with high-value clients.

top_fixes.title: Add prominent 'Call Now' and 'Free Consultation' buttons
top_fixes.description: Your homepage has no clear buttons for people to contact you immediately. Potential clients looking for urgent legal help will leave if they can't quickly find how to get in touch. Add bright, obvious buttons above the fold saying 'Call (02) XXXX XXXX' and 'Book Free Consultation'.

top_fixes.title: Add a contact form to your homepage
top_fixes.description: Right now people have to click to another page to contact you — many won't bother. A simple contact form on your homepage saying 'Get Legal Help Today' will catch more potential clients who want to reach out but don't want to make a phone call immediately.

top_fixes.title: Speed up your website by reducing code bloat
top_fixes.description: Your site loads 27 different code files and 25 style files — that's like having 52 different documents download before your page appears. This makes your site slow, especially on phones, and Google ranks slower sites lower. A web developer can combine these files to make your site much faster.

top_fixes.title: Make your business info clearer to Google
top_fixes.description: Google is getting confused about whether you're one business or multiple locations because of mixed location data. This could hurt your local search rankings in Canberra. Clean up your business information so Google clearly understands you're a single Canberra law firm.

top_fixes.title: Rewrite your homepage content to be more specific
top_fixes.description: Your current content is quite generic ('we deliver expert legal services'). Potential clients want to know exactly what you've achieved. Add specific examples: 'We've recovered $X in personal injury claims' or 'We've handled 500+ property settlements'. This builds more trust and helps Google understand what you do.

top_fixes.title: Add a 'skip to main content' link for accessibility
top_fixes.description: People using screen readers or keyboards to navigate can't easily jump past your menu to your main content. This makes your site harder to use for people with disabilities, and Google considers accessibility in rankings. It's a simple one-line fix that helps both users and SEO.

top_fixes.title: Make your page title more compelling for Google search
top_fixes.description: Your title 'Canberra Lawyers | Canberra Law Firm | Canberra Barristers' is repetitive and doesn't tell people why they should choose you. Something like 'Canberra's Experienced Lawyers - Family Law, Property & Personal Injury' would get more clicks from Google search results.

top_fixes.title: Move client testimonials higher up on your page
top_fixes.description: You have testimonials but they're buried down the page where many visitors won't see them. Social proof is crucial for legal services — people want to know others have had good experiences. Move these testimonials right under your main headline to build immediate trust.

result.email_draft: G'day! I ran a quick health check on your website and found a few things that could help you get more local customers. Your site looks professional, but I noticed there are no clear 'Call Now' or contact form buttons on your homepage — potential clients looking for urgent legal help might leave if they can't quickly see how to reach you. I also spotted that your site is loading quite slowly due to too many code files running (52 different files!), which is hurting your Google rankings and frustrating mobile users. These are fairly straightforward fixes that could make a real difference to your client enquiries. Happy to chat about this over a free 15-minute call if you'd like some specific advice on prioritising these improvements. Cheers, Jarek Piotrowski, LayerOps

Since our humble beginnings, Maxwell & Co. has expanded to multiple states across Australia and then across the Asia-Pacific corridor, having connections in Shanghai and Malaysia.

First and foremost, Maxwell & Co. values the relationship between the solicitor and the client. We assist our clients in navigating complex legal scenarios and give them strategies to meet any objectives (whether personal or business related), without neglecting the efficiency, communication and
It’s not uncommon to find Canberra Law firms being behind the times. At Maxwell & Co. we understand that the legal service market is changing.
We have always been in close touch with our roots, being originally founded in Canberra, though have never been afraid to embrace change and diversity.
We’re well equipped to handle the adversities of a globalising world, amidst a time of unprecedented information technology development.
Not only can we say “we get it”, but we love the challenge of delivering traditional legal services in a progressive and innovative way.
Felix is recognised for his precise attention to detail and robust problem-solving skills, qualities that drive him to achieve the best results for his clients.
He prioritises establishing strong personal connections with his clients, dedicating time to understand their needs thoroughly and advocate passionately on their behalf.
Ankur’s practice focuses on property and commercial law, covering residential and commercial property transactions, business sales and purchases, and leasing matters across NSW and ACT.
Ankur is recognised for his meticulous attention to detail and strong problem-solving skills, consistently achieving excellent outcomes for his clients.
We turn legal challenges into legal triumphs.
We don’t just know the law, we own it!
Not only can we say “we get it”, but we love the challenge of delivering traditional legal services in a progressive and innovative way.
